TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Me Too == Harvy Weinstein ayaw i tusa a malebut izaw ku sabaw pitu a mihcaan, cacay a bataan a bulad, lima a demiad, misulitay nu 紐約 singbun, saayaway nisuliten ku la'cusay a wayway nu Harvy Weinstein. itini i nasulitan, i ayaw tulu a bataan a mihcaan, mitebing ciniza tu uzip nu tatayna a misakakaway atu milinziay niza; namakayda sa, malaheci nika sasakamuan u saka nga ayay (sakapahay) izaw ku walu sapabaysyu a kawaw.
S.PHON: == mə too == ħar*j wəinstəin ajaw i tusa a mar~ɾəbut izaw ku sabaw pitu a miħʦaan, ʦaʦaj a bataan a bur~ɾad, r~ɾima a dəmiad, misur~ɾitaj nu ** siŋbun, saajawaj nisur~ɾitən ku r~ɾaʔ~ʡʦusaj a wajwaj nu ħar*j wəinstəin. itini i nasur~ɾitan, i ajaw tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan, mitəbiŋ ʦiniza tu uzip nu tatajna a misakakawaj atu mir~ɾinziaj niza; namakajda sa, mar~ɾaħəʦi nika sasakamuan u saka ŋa ajaj (sakapaħaj) izaw ku war~ɾu sapabajsju a kawaw.
S.FORM: == Me Too == Harvy Weinstein ayaw i tusa a malebut izaw ku sabaw pitu a mihcaan, cacay a bataan a bulad, lima a demiad, misulitay nu 紐約 singbun, saayaway nisuliten ku la'cusay a wayway nu Harvy Weinstein. itini i nasulitan, i ayaw tulu a bataan a mihcaan, mitebing ciniza tu uzip nu tatayna a misakakaway atu milinziay niza; namakayda sa, malaheci nika sasakamuan u saka nga ayay (sakapahay) izaw ku walu sapabaysyu a kawaw.
S.PHON: == mə too == ħar*j wəinstəin ajaw i tusa a mar~ɾəbut izaw ku sabaw pitu a miħʦaan, ʦaʦaj a bataan a bur~ɾad, r~ɾima a dəmiad, misur~ɾitaj nu ** siŋbun, saajawaj nisur~ɾitən ku r~ɾaʔ~ʡʦusaj a wajwaj nu ħar*j wəinstəin. itini i nasur~ɾitan, i ajaw tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan, mitəbiŋ ʦiniza tu uzip nu tatajna a misakakawaj atu mir~ɾinziaj niza; namakajda sa, mar~ɾaħəʦi nika sasakamuan u saka ŋa ajaj (sakapaħaj) izaw ku war~ɾu sapabajsju a kawaw.
